original: This medicine is based upon a traditional myr remedy, administered to counteract the hormones released by bothrioc impregnation. It appears as a rather unappetizing, large brown lozenge.
context: <<POS:06333187>> Curdsonwhey lozenge",e.tooltip='This medicine is based upon a traditional myr remedy, admini'

original: You pop the lozenge into your mouth. Ugh! So bitter. With some effort you swallow, carrying the unpleasant flavor away from your taste buds and down to your gut.
context: <<POS:06333615>> output("You pop the lozenge into your mouth. Ugh! So bitter. With some effort you swallow, carrying the unpleasant flavor away from your taste buds and down to your gut.")

original: Nothing really feels different, but the unmistakable taste still lingers in the back of your throat....
context: <> output("\n\nNothing really feels different, but the unmistakable taste still lingers in the back of your throat....")

original: {var0}+{var1}+" gobs the pill to no effect.
context: <<POS:06334067>> <<VARS:var0=e.capitalA,var1=e.short>> output(e.capitalA+e.short+" gobs the pill to no effect.")

original: You roll your [pc.tongue], trying to get rid of the bitter aftertaste in your mouth. You feel slightly more clear and cynical about the world around you. Fortunately, a soft core of calm and happiness remains, untouched by your current sourness. Perhaps that will always be with you, now.

Fortunately, a soft core of calm and happiness remains, untouched by your current sourness. Perhaps that will always be with you, now."...

original: You roll your [pc.tongue], trying to get rid of the bitter aftertaste in your mouth. You feel slightly more cogent and aware of the world around you; however it’s not a particularly nice sensation. Cynicism and jadedness steals over you about your current set of goals.

You feel slightly more cogent and aware of the world around you; however it’s not a particularly nice sensation. Cynicism and jadedness steals over you about your current set of goals.")
